# Acceptance Criteria Template

<!-- Generated by: Skill 07 (Quality & Verification) + Skill 02 (Goal & Brief) -->
<!-- Purpose: Defines DONE for the product. No ambiguity. Every criterion is testable. -->
<!-- Lives at: ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md in the project root -->
<!-- Rule: Product is not shipped until ALL P0 criteria pass. P1 should pass. P2 is nice-to-have. -->

## Core Functionality (P0 — Must Pass)

<!-- The product does what it says. Each criterion maps to a Playwright test. -->

- [ ] **Homepage renders** — Loads within 3s, displays correct hero text, no console errors
- [ ] **Primary user flow** — [Describe the main thing users do] completable end-to-end
- [ ] **Authentication** — Sign up, sign in, sign out, password reset all work (if applicable)
- [ ] **Payment flow** — Checkout to confirmation works with Stripe test cards (if applicable)
- [ ] **Contact form** — Submits successfully, sends email via Resend, shows confirmation
- [ ] **API health** — GET /health returns 200 with `{ status: "ok", version, timestamp }`
- [ ] **Data persistence** — Created data survives page refresh and is retrievable

## Visual & Responsive (P0 — Must Pass)

<!-- GPT-4o visual inspection at all 6 breakpoints -->

- [ ] **375px (iPhone SE)** — No horizontal overflow, touch targets >= 44px, readable text
- [ ] **390px (iPhone 14)** — Layout correct, images sized properly
- [ ] **768px (iPad)** — Tablet layout activates, navigation adapts
- [ ] **1024px (iPad landscape)** — Content properly distributed
- [ ] **1280px (Laptop)** — Full desktop layout, no wasted space
- [ ] **1920px (Desktop)** — Max-width container centered, no stretching
- [ ] **Dark theme** — All pages render correctly in dark mode (our default)
- [ ] **No visual breaks** — No overlapping elements, clipped text, or broken images at any size

## Performance (P0 — Must Pass)

- [ ] **Lighthouse Performance** >= 90
- [ ] **Lighthouse Accessibility** >= 90
- [ ] **Lighthouse Best Practices** >= 90
- [ ] **Lighthouse SEO** >= 90
- [ ] **First Contentful Paint** < 1.8s
- [ ] **Largest Contentful Paint** < 2.5s
- [ ] **Cumulative Layout Shift** < 0.1
- [ ] **Time to Interactive** < 3.9s

## Accessibility (P0 — Must Pass)

<!-- Skill 20 — zero violations policy -->

- [ ] **axe-core audit** — 0 violations on all pages
- [ ] **Skip-to-content link** — Present and functional
- [ ] **Keyboard navigation** — All interactive elements reachable via Tab
- [ ] **Focus indicators** — 2px solid cyan, 3px offset on all focusable elements
- [ ] **Color contrast** — 4.5:1 minimum ratio on all text
- [ ] **Alt text** — All images have descriptive alt attributes
- [ ] **Form labels** — All inputs have associated labels
- [ ] **ARIA landmarks** — main, nav, header, footer properly marked
- [ ] **Screen reader** — Page makes sense when read linearly

## SEO (P1 — Should Pass)

<!-- Skill 28 -->

- [ ] **Title tags** — 50-60 chars, unique per page, includes primary keyword
- [ ] **Meta descriptions** — 120-156 chars, unique per page, includes CTA
- [ ] **One H1 per page** — Matches the page intent
- [ ] **Canonical URLs** — Set on all pages
- [ ] **JSON-LD** — 4+ structured data blocks (Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Product/Service)
- [ ] **OG tags** — og:title, og:description, og:image (1200x630) on all pages
- [ ] **Sitemap** — /sitemap.xml exists, valid, submitted to GSC
- [ ] **Robots.txt** — /robots.txt exists, allows crawling, references sitemap
- [ ] **Internal links** — Every page has >= 2 internal links

## Security (P1 — Should Pass)

- [ ] **CSP headers** — Content-Security-Policy set and restrictive
- [ ] **No exposed secrets** — No API keys in client-side code or git history
- [ ] **Input validation** — Zod schemas on all user inputs (client + server)
- [ ] **Turnstile** — CAPTCHA on all public forms
- [ ] **Rate limiting** — KV-based per-IP counters on public endpoints
- [ ] **HTTPS only** — No mixed content, HSTS headers set
- [ ] **Auth boundaries** — Protected routes reject unauthenticated requests

## Integration (P1 — Should Pass)

- [ ] **Analytics** — GA4 firing page_view events on navigation
- [ ] **PostHog** — Events tracked, feature flags working
- [ ] **Error tracking** — Sentry capturing and reporting errors
- [ ] **Email** — Transactional emails sending via Resend
- [ ] **Payments** — Stripe webhooks receiving and processing (if applicable)

## Polish (P2 — Nice to Have)

- [ ] **Easter egg** — At least one hidden delight (Skill 15)
- [ ] **Loading states** — Skeleton screens on data-dependent views
- [ ] **Empty states** — Helpful prompts when lists are empty (Skill 48)
- [ ] **Error pages** — Custom 404, 500, offline pages (Skill 31)
- [ ] **Animations** — Meaningful motion on scroll and interaction (Skill 11)
- [ ] **PWA** — Installable, offline-capable, manifest complete (Skill 24)
- [ ] **Notifications** — Push notifications set up (Skill 49)

## Test Coverage

- [ ] **E2E tests** — Playwright tests for all P0 criteria, passing in CI
- [ ] **Unit tests** — 100% coverage on new business logic (Vitest)
- [ ] **Form matrix** — 8-point test on every form (empty, valid, invalid, XSS, SQL injection, boundary, duplicate, timeout)
- [ ] **Cross-browser** — Chrome, Firefox, Safari verified on first deploy

## Sign-Off

| Check | Status | Verified By | Date |
|-------|--------|-------------|------|
| All P0 pass | [ ] | AI visual + E2E | |
| All P1 pass | [ ] | Automated checks | |
| User can complete primary flow | [ ] | Manual test | |
| Production URL live | [ ] | curl + browser | |
